Establishment

Justine Floret

2024-07-11

Library and Data preparation

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(reshape2) #melt function
library(forcats) #reorganise in geom boxplot
library(kableExtra) # Markdown table

# Stat library 
# library(lme4)
library(lmerTest) #glht
# library(MASS)
library(lsmeans) #pairwise comparison
library(multcomp)  #glht
library(multcompView)  #glht
library(rstatix) # manova levene test

# Graphic library
library(GGally) #ppair plot
library(ggplot2)
library(viridis)
library(svglite) # save in svg format
library(corrplot)

colors <- c("#6ece58", "#22a884", "#355f8d","#440154")

data_all <- read_csv("/home/justine/sciebo/1_Populations/2_assay/dataset/Phenology_field.csv")

data_all$Site_ID <- as.factor(data_all$Site_ID)
data_all$Area <- as.factor(data_all$Area)
data_all$Localization_ID <- as.factor(data_all$Localization_ID)
data_all$Type <- as.factor(data_all$Type)
data_all$Destroyed <- as.factor(data_all$Destroyed)
data_all$Outliers_soil <- as.factor(data_all$Outliers_soil)
data_all$Sowing_1st <- as.factor(data_all$Sowing_1st)
data_all$Sowing_2nd <- as.factor(data_all$Sowing_2nd)
data_all$Germ_2ndyear <- as.factor(data_all$Germ_2ndyear)
data_all$Presence_April_22 <- as.factor(data_all$Presence_April_22)
data_all$Presence_April_23 <- as.factor(data_all$Presence_April_23)
data_all$Presence_April_24 <- as.factor(data_all$Presence_April_24)

Data summary

data_all %>% count(Type) # tot number of site sowed
## # A tibble: 4 × 2
##   Type         n
##   <fct>    <int>
## 1 grass      147
## 2 pavement   144
## 3 Tree bed   107
## 4 wall        93
data_all %>% dplyr::group_by(Sowing_1st) %>% count(Type)
## # A tibble: 8 × 3
## # Groups:   Sowing_1st [2]
##   Sowing_1st Type         n
##   <fct>      <fct>    <int>
## 1 07/2022    grass       10
## 2 07/2022    pavement    20
## 3 07/2022    Tree bed     1
## 4 07/2022    wall        46
## 5 09/2021    grass      137
## 6 09/2021    pavement   124
## 7 09/2021    Tree bed   106
## 8 09/2021    wall        47
data_all %>% dplyr::group_by(Sowing_1st, Type) %>% count(Destroyed)  # site destroyed
## # A tibble: 16 × 4
## # Groups:   Sowing_1st, Type [8]
##    Sowing_1st Type     Destroyed     n
##    <fct>      <fct>    <fct>     <int>
##  1 07/2022    grass    Exist        10
##  2 07/2022    pavement Exist        20
##  3 07/2022    Tree bed Exist         1
##  4 07/2022    wall     04/2023       2
##  5 07/2022    wall     Exist        44
##  6 09/2021    grass    02/2022      16
##  7 09/2021    grass    04/2024       2
##  8 09/2021    grass    09/2022       3
##  9 09/2021    grass    10/2022      10
## 10 09/2021    grass    Exist       106
## 11 09/2021    pavement 02/2022       5
## 12 09/2021    pavement Exist       119
## 13 09/2021    Tree bed 05/2022       1
## 14 09/2021    Tree bed 10/2022       1
## 15 09/2021    Tree bed Exist       104
## 16 09/2021    wall     Exist        47
data_all %>% dplyr::group_by(Sowing_2nd) %>% count(Type)  # site resown in July 2022
## # A tibble: 6 × 3
## # Groups:   Sowing_2nd [2]
##   Sowing_2nd Type         n
##   <fct>      <fct>    <int>
## 1 07/2022    pavement    19
## 2 07/2022    Tree bed     6
## 3 no         grass      147
## 4 no         pavement   125
## 5 no         Tree bed   101
## 6 no         wall        93

April 2022

September 2021 sowing only

# Number of site after removing the destroyed site before 03/2022
establishment <- as.data.frame( data_all %>% dplyr::filter(Destroyed == "Exist" | Destroyed =="05/2022" | Destroyed =="09/2022" | Destroyed =="10/2022" | Destroyed =="04/2023"| Destroyed =="04/2024") %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Sowing_1st =="09/2021") %>% count(Type))

colnames(establishment) <- c("Type", "Site_April22")

# Established sites
tmp <- as.data.frame(data_all %>% dplyr::filter(Destroyed == "Exist" | Destroyed =="05/2022" | Destroyed =="09/2022" | Destroyed =="10/2022" | Destroyed =="04/2024") %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Sowing_1st =="09/2021") %>% dplyr::filter(Presence_April_22 == "Yes") %>% count(Type))
establishment$Established_April22 <- tmp[,2]  

# Percentage of establishment 
establishment$Percentage_April22 <- round(establishment$Established_April22 / establishment$Site_April22 * 100, digit = 2)

ggplot(establishment, aes(x = Type, y=Percentage_April22, fill = Type )) + geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  theme_minimal() + scale_fill_manual(values=colors)

#ggsave("Establishment_April22_S1",device = "svg" ,dpi=900)
#ggsave("/home/justine/sciebo/Paper_urban_niche/Figures/Establishment_April22_S1", plot = last_plot(),dpi = 900, device = "svg", bg = "transparent")

Model Presence/absence

April_22 <- as.data.frame( data_all %>% dplyr::filter(Destroyed == "Exist" | Destroyed =="05/2022" | Destroyed =="09/2022" | Destroyed =="10/2022" | Destroyed =="04/2023"| Destroyed =="04/2024") %>% 
                 dplyr::filter(Sowing_1st =="09/2021"))
               
modnul <- glm(Presence_April_22 ~ 1, data = April_22 ,family = binomial)

mod1 <- glm(Presence_April_22 ~ Type, data = April_22 ,family = binomial)
summary(mod1)
## 
## Call:
## glm(formula = Presence_April_22 ~ Type, family = binomial, data = April_22)
## 
## Coefficients:
##              Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept)   -1.2958     0.2213  -5.854 4.79e-09 ***
## Typepavement   0.8340     0.2906   2.870  0.00410 ** 
## TypeTree bed   0.9528     0.2964   3.215  0.00131 ** 
## Typewall       2.4814     0.4095   6.060 1.36e-09 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## (Dispersion parameter for binomial family taken to be 1)
## 
##     Null deviance: 524.48  on 392  degrees of freedom
## Residual deviance: 479.74  on 389  degrees of freedom
## AIC: 487.74
## 
## Number of Fisher Scoring iterations: 4
qqnorm(resid(mod1))

mod2 <- glm(Presence_April_22 ~ Type, data = April_22 ,family = quasibinomial)
summary(mod2)
## 
## Call:
## glm(formula = Presence_April_22 ~ Type, family = quasibinomial, 
##     data = April_22)
## 
## Coefficients:
##              Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)   -1.2958     0.2225  -5.825 1.20e-08 ***
## Typepavement   0.8340     0.2921   2.856  0.00453 ** 
## TypeTree bed   0.9528     0.2979   3.198  0.00149 ** 
## Typewall       2.4814     0.4116   6.029 3.84e-09 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## (Dispersion parameter for quasibinomial family taken to be 1.010283)
## 
##     Null deviance: 524.48  on 392  degrees of freedom
## Residual deviance: 479.74  on 389  degrees of freedom
## AIC: NA
## 
## Number of Fisher Scoring iterations: 4
qqnorm(resid(mod2))

anova(modnul, mod1, mod2,test="LRT")
## Analysis of Deviance Table
## 
## Model 1: Presence_April_22 ~ 1
## Model 2: Presence_April_22 ~ Type
## Model 3: Presence_April_22 ~ Type
##   Resid. Df Resid. Dev Df Deviance  Pr(>Chi)    
## 1       392     524.48                          
## 2       389     479.74  3   44.747 1.047e-09 ***
## 3       389     479.74  0    0.000              
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
car::Anova(mod1)
## Analysis of Deviance Table (Type II tests)
## 
## Response: Presence_April_22
##      LR Chisq Df Pr(>Chisq)    
## Type   44.747  3  1.047e-09 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
car::Anova(mod1, test.statistic="F")
## Analysis of Deviance Table (Type II tests)
## 
## Response: Presence_April_22
## Error estimate based on Pearson residuals 
## 
##           Sum Sq  Df F value    Pr(>F)    
## Type       44.75   3  14.764 4.012e-09 ***
## Residuals 393.00 389                      
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
leastsquare = lsmeans(mod1, pairwise ~ Type,adjust = "tukey")
cld(leastsquare)
##  Type     lsmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL .group
##  grass    -1.296 0.221 Inf    -1.730   -0.8620  1    
##  pavement -0.462 0.188 Inf    -0.831   -0.0929   2   
##  Tree bed -0.343 0.197 Inf    -0.729    0.0434   2   
##  wall      1.186 0.345 Inf     0.510    1.8608    3  
## 
## Results are given on the logit (not the response) scale. 
## Confidence level used: 0.95 
## Results are given on the log odds ratio (not the response) scale. 
## P value adjustment: tukey method for comparing a family of 4 estimates 
## significance level used: alpha = 0.05 
## NOTE: If two or more means share the same grouping symbol,
##       then we cannot show them to be different.
##       But we also did not show them to be the same.

April 2023

September 2021 sowing only

# Number of site after removing the destroyed site before 05/2023
tmp <- as.data.frame( data_all %>% dplyr::filter(Destroyed == "Exist" | Destroyed =="04/2024") %>% 
                 dplyr::filter(Sowing_1st =="09/2021") %>% count(Type))
establishment$Site_April23_S1 <- tmp[,2]

# Established sites
tmp <- as.data.frame(data_all %>% dplyr::filter(Destroyed == "Exist" | Destroyed =="04/2024") %>% 
                       dplyr::filter(Sowing_1st =="09/2021") %>% dplyr::filter(Presence_April_23 == "Yes") %>% count(Type))
establishment$Established_April23_S1 <- tmp[,2]  


tmp <- as.data.frame(data_all %>% dplyr::filter(Destroyed == "Exist" | Destroyed =="04/2024") %>% 
                       dplyr::filter(Sowing_1st =="07/2022") %>% dplyr::filter(Presence_April_23 == "Yes") %>% count(Type))
establishment$Established_April23_S2 <- tmp[,2]  

# Percentage of establishment 
establishment$Percentage_April23_S1 <- round(establishment$Established_April23_S1 / establishment$Site_April23_S1 * 100, digit = 2)

ggplot(establishment, aes(x = Type, y=Percentage_April23_S1, fill = Type)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  theme_minimal() + scale_fill_manual(values=colors)

Model Presence/absence

April_23 <- as.data.frame( data_all %>% dplyr::filter(Destroyed == "Exist"| Destroyed =="04/2024") %>% 
                             dplyr::filter(Sowing_1st =="09/2021") %>% dplyr::filter(Sowing_2nd =="no"))

mod1 <- glm(Presence_April_23 ~ Type, data = April_23 ,family = binomial)
summary(mod1)
## 
## Call:
## glm(formula = Presence_April_23 ~ Type, family = binomial, data = April_23)
## 
## Coefficients:
##              Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept)   -1.2000     0.2281  -5.260 1.44e-07 ***
## Typepavement   1.0396     0.3038   3.422 0.000622 ***
## TypeTree bed   0.4293     0.3150   1.363 0.172982    
## Typewall       1.5877     0.3747   4.237 2.26e-05 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## (Dispersion parameter for binomial family taken to be 1)
## 
##     Null deviance: 464.57  on 352  degrees of freedom
## Residual deviance: 440.60  on 349  degrees of freedom
## AIC: 448.6
## 
## Number of Fisher Scoring iterations: 4
anova(mod1, test="LRT")
## Analysis of Deviance Table
## 
## Model: binomial, link: logit
## 
## Response: Presence_April_23
## 
## Terms added sequentially (first to last)
## 
## 
##      Df Deviance Resid. Df Resid. Dev  Pr(>Chi)    
## NULL                   352     464.57              
## Type  3   23.972       349     440.60 2.532e-05 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
qqnorm(resid(mod1))

summary(glht(mod1,linfct = mcp(Type="Tukey")))
## 
##   Simultaneous Tests for General Linear Hypotheses
## 
## Multiple Comparisons of Means: Tukey Contrasts
## 
## 
## Fit: glm(formula = Presence_April_23 ~ Type, family = binomial, data = April_23)
## 
## Linear Hypotheses:
##                          Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## pavement - grass == 0      1.0396     0.3038   3.422  0.00363 ** 
## Tree bed - grass == 0      0.4293     0.3150   1.363  0.52031    
## wall - grass == 0          1.5877     0.3747   4.237  < 0.001 ***
## Tree bed - pavement == 0  -0.6104     0.2957  -2.064  0.16340    
## wall - pavement == 0       0.5481     0.3586   1.528  0.41774    
## wall - Tree bed == 0       1.1585     0.3681   3.147  0.00908 ** 
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## (Adjusted p values reported -- single-step method)

Compare April 2022 and April 2023

# creating data frame for establishment percentage in one column
establishment2 <- data.frame("Year" = c("2023","2023","2023","2023","2022","2022","2022","2022"),"Type_Year" = c("grass_23","pavement_23","Tree bed_23","wall_23","grass_22","pavement_22","Tree bed_22","wall_22"), "Percentage_establishment" = c(establishment$Percentage_April23_S1, establishment$Percentage_April22))


#graph 
colors <- c("#6ece58", "#6ece58", "#22a884", "#22a884", "#355f8d", "#355f8d", "#440154", "#440154")
ggplot(establishment2, aes(x = Type_Year ,y=Percentage_establishment, fill = Type_Year)) + geom_bar(aes(alpha = Year), stat = "identity") +
  theme_minimal() +  scale_discrete_manual(aesthetics = "fill", values =colors)+ scale_alpha_discrete(range = c(0.5,1))

# model establishment over two generations (2021 sowing only)
# preparation of the data set 
tmp1 <- April_22[,c(4,10)]
colnames(tmp1) <- c("Type", "Presence")
tmp1$Census_Year <- paste(tmp1$Type, "_", "2022")
tmp1$Year <- rep("2022")

tmp2 <- April_23[,c(4,11)]
colnames(tmp2) <- c("Type", "Presence")
tmp2$Census_Year <- paste(tmp2$Type, "_", "2023")
tmp2$Year <- rep("2023")

mod_Presence <- rbind(tmp1, tmp2)

mod3 <- glm(Presence ~ Type*Year, data = mod_Presence ,family = binomial)
summary(mod3)
## 
## Call:
## glm(formula = Presence ~ Type * Year, family = binomial, data = mod_Presence)
## 
## Coefficients:
##                       Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept)           -1.29578    0.22133  -5.854 4.79e-09 ***
## Typepavement           0.83396    0.29056   2.870  0.00410 ** 
## TypeTree bed           0.95284    0.29639   3.215  0.00131 ** 
## Typewall               2.48140    0.40948   6.060 1.36e-09 ***
## Year2023               0.09582    0.31786   0.301  0.76308    
## Typepavement:Year2023  0.20566    0.42039   0.489  0.62470    
## TypeTree bed:Year2023 -0.52358    0.43252  -1.211  0.22608    
## Typewall:Year2023     -0.89367    0.55504  -1.610  0.10737    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## (Dispersion parameter for binomial family taken to be 1)
## 
##     Null deviance: 989.32  on 745  degrees of freedom
## Residual deviance: 920.33  on 738  degrees of freedom
## AIC: 936.33
## 
## Number of Fisher Scoring iterations: 4
anova(mod3,test="LRT")
## Analysis of Deviance Table
## 
## Model: binomial, link: logit
## 
## Response: Presence
## 
## Terms added sequentially (first to last)
## 
## 
##           Df Deviance Resid. Df Resid. Dev  Pr(>Chi)    
## NULL                        745     989.32              
## Type       3   62.389       742     926.93 1.814e-13 ***
## Year       1    0.418       741     926.51    0.5179    
## Type:Year  3    6.182       738     920.33    0.1031    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
qqnorm(resid(mod3))

summary(glht(mod3,linfct = mcp(Type="Tukey"))) 
## 
##   Simultaneous Tests for General Linear Hypotheses
## 
## Multiple Comparisons of Means: Tukey Contrasts
## 
## 
## Fit: glm(formula = Presence ~ Type * Year, family = binomial, data = mod_Presence)
## 
## Linear Hypotheses:
##                          Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## pavement - grass == 0      0.8340     0.2906   2.870   0.0207 *  
## Tree bed - grass == 0      0.9528     0.2964   3.215   0.0067 ** 
## wall - grass == 0          2.4814     0.4095   6.060   <0.001 ***
## Tree bed - pavement == 0   0.1189     0.2726   0.436   0.9716    
## wall - pavement == 0       1.6474     0.3926   4.196   <0.001 ***
## wall - Tree bed == 0       1.5286     0.3969   3.851   <0.001 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## (Adjusted p values reported -- single-step method)
#no interaction between type and census year
leastsquare = lsmeans(mod3, pairwise ~ Type,adjust = "tukey")
cld(leastsquare)
##  Type     lsmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL .group
##  grass    -1.248 0.159 Inf    -1.559   -0.9364  1    
##  Tree bed -0.557 0.147 Inf    -0.844   -0.2694   2   
##  pavement -0.311 0.138 Inf    -0.581   -0.0415   2   
##  wall      0.787 0.228 Inf     0.341    1.2326    3  
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: Year 
## Results are given on the logit (not the response) scale. 
## Confidence level used: 0.95 
## Results are given on the log odds ratio (not the response) scale. 
## P value adjustment: tukey method for comparing a family of 4 estimates 
## significance level used: alpha = 0.05 
## NOTE: If two or more means share the same grouping symbol,
##       then we cannot show them to be different.
##       But we also did not show them to be the same.

July 2022 sowing only

No environmental effects

# Number of site after removing the destroyed site before 05/2023
tmp <-as.data.frame( data_all %>% dplyr::filter(Destroyed == "Exist" | Destroyed =="04/2024") %>% 
                 dplyr::filter(Sowing_1st =="07/2022") %>% count(Type))
establishment$Site_April23_S2 <- tmp[,2]

# Established sites
tmp <- as.data.frame(data_all %>% dplyr::filter(Destroyed == "Exist" | Destroyed =="04/2024") %>% 
                       dplyr::filter(Sowing_1st =="07/2022") %>% dplyr::filter(Presence_April_23 == "Yes") %>% count(Type))
establishment$Established_April23_S2 <- tmp[,2]  

establishment$Percentage_April23_S2 <- round(establishment$Established_April23_S2 / establishment$Site_April23_S2 * 100, digit = 2)
ggplot(establishment, aes(x = Type, y=Percentage_April23_S2, fill = Type)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  theme_minimal() + scale_fill_viridis(discrete = TRUE, begin = 0.3, end = 0.9, option = "B" )  

April_23_S2 <- as.data.frame( data_all %>% dplyr::filter(Destroyed == "Exist"| Destroyed =="04/2024") %>% 
                             dplyr::filter(Sowing_1st =="07/2022") %>% dplyr::filter(Sowing_2nd =="no"))

mod1 <- glm(Presence_April_23 ~ Type, data = April_23_S2 ,family = binomial)
summary(mod1)
## 
## Call:
## glm(formula = Presence_April_23 ~ Type, family = binomial, data = April_23_S2)
## 
## Coefficients:
##                Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)
## (Intercept)   1.857e+01  2.063e+03   0.009    0.993
## Typepavement -1.562e+01  2.063e+03  -0.008    0.994
## TypeTree bed  1.188e-08  6.841e+03   0.000    1.000
## Typewall     -1.651e+01  2.063e+03  -0.008    0.994
## 
## (Dispersion parameter for binomial family taken to be 1)
## 
##     Null deviance: 41.815  on 74  degrees of freedom
## Residual deviance: 39.097  on 71  degrees of freedom
## AIC: 47.097
## 
## Number of Fisher Scoring iterations: 17
anova(mod1, test="LRT")
## Analysis of Deviance Table
## 
## Model: binomial, link: logit
## 
## Response: Presence_April_23
## 
## Terms added sequentially (first to last)
## 
## 
##      Df Deviance Resid. Df Resid. Dev Pr(>Chi)
## NULL                    74     41.815         
## Type  3   2.7183        71     39.097   0.4371
qqnorm(resid(mod1))

Comparing establishment between 2021 sowing and 2022 sowing

To compare both sowing we are going to compare the number of established individual over the total number of seed sown (2021 : 1 000 seeds, 2022 : 10 000 seeds)

establishment_S1_S2  <- as.data.frame(data_all %>% dplyr::filter(Destroyed == "Exist" | Destroyed =="04/2024") %>% 
                 dplyr::filter(Sowing_2nd =="no") %>% select(Site_ID, Type, Sowing_1st, April_23))

tmp<- establishment_S1_S2 %>% dplyr::filter(Sowing_1st =="09/2021") %>% mutate(April_23 / 1000 *100)
colnames(tmp) <- c("Site_ID", "Type", "Sowing_1st", "April_23", "Idv_establised")
tmp2 <- establishment_S1_S2 %>% dplyr::filter(Sowing_1st =="07/2022") %>% mutate(April_23 / 10000 *100)
colnames(tmp2) <- c("Site_ID", "Type", "Sowing_1st", "April_23", "Idv_establised")

establishment_S1_S2  <- rbind(tmp, tmp2)
establishment_S1_S2$Type_Year  <- paste(establishment_S1_S2$Type, "_", establishment_S1_S2$Sowing_1st)
establishment_S1_S2$Idv_establised <- as.numeric(establishment_S1_S2$Idv_establised)

For the graphic I removed the site with no established populations to be more easy to read.

colors <- c("gold1", "darkgoldenrod4")
establishment_S1_S2 %>% filter(Idv_establised >0) %>% filter(Type == "pavement" | Type =="grass" | Type =="wall") %>%
  ggplot( aes(x = Type_Year ,y=Idv_establised, fill = Sowing_1st)) + geom_boxplot() +  theme_minimal() +  scale_discrete_manual(aesthetics = "fill", values =colors)

For the model I kept the site with no population established

mod2 <- glm.nb(Idv_establised ~  Type*Sowing_1st, data = establishment_S1_S2)

mod3 <- glm(Idv_establised ~ Type*Sowing_1st, data = establishment_S1_S2, family=negative.binomial(theta=mod2[["theta"]]))
summary(mod3)
## 
## Call:
## glm(formula = Idv_establised ~ Type * Sowing_1st, family = negative.binomial(theta = mod2[["theta"]]), 
##     data = establishment_S1_S2)
## 
## Coefficients:
##                                Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)
## (Intercept)                    -0.20334    0.84243  -0.241    0.809
## Typepavement                   -0.66893    1.07601  -0.622    0.534
## TypeTree bed                    0.04082    2.77997   0.015    0.988
## Typewall                       -0.46093    0.94943  -0.485    0.628
## Sowing_1st09/2021              -0.45881    0.88655  -0.518    0.605
## Typepavement:Sowing_1st09/2021  1.61099    1.13909   1.414    0.158
## TypeTree bed:Sowing_1st09/2021  0.92746    2.80517   0.331    0.741
## Typewall:Sowing_1st09/2021      0.21737    1.08219   0.201    0.841
## 
## (Dispersion parameter for Negative Binomial(0.3111) family taken to be 1.59849)
## 
##     Null deviance: 392.55  on 426  degrees of freedom
## Residual deviance: 368.38  on 419  degrees of freedom
##   (1 observation deleted due to missingness)
## AIC: 999.71
## 
## Number of Fisher Scoring iterations: 7
anova(mod3, test="LRT")
## Analysis of Deviance Table
## 
## Model: Negative Binomial(0.3111), link: log
## 
## Response: Idv_establised
## 
## Terms added sequentially (first to last)
## 
## 
##                 Df Deviance Resid. Df Resid. Dev Pr(>Chi)   
## NULL                              426     392.55            
## Type             3  19.5889       423     372.96  0.00656 **
## Sowing_1st       1   0.1747       422     372.79  0.74094   
## Type:Sowing_1st  3   4.4137       419     368.38  0.42993   
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
qqnorm(resid(mod3))

Same ratio of seeds established per seed sown for both Sowing = same germinating rate

April 2024

September 2021 sowing only

# Number of site after removing the destroyed site before 05/2023
tmp <- as.data.frame( data_all %>% dplyr::filter(Destroyed == "Exist") %>% 
                 dplyr::filter(Sowing_1st =="09/2021") %>% count(Type))
establishment$Site_April24_S1 <- tmp[,2]

# Established sites
tmp <- as.data.frame(data_all %>% dplyr::filter(Destroyed == "Exist") %>% 
                       dplyr::filter(Sowing_1st =="09/2021") %>% dplyr::filter(Presence_April_24 == "Yes") %>% count(Type))
establishment$Established_April24_S1 <- tmp[,2]  

# Percentage of establishment 
establishment$Percentage_April24_S1 <- round(establishment$Established_April24_S1 / establishment$Site_April24_S1 * 100, digit = 2)

ggplot(establishment, aes(x = Type, y=Percentage_April24_S1, fill = Type)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  theme_minimal() + scale_fill_viridis(discrete = TRUE, begin = 0.3, end = 0.9, option = "B" )

Model Presence/absence

April_24 <- as.data.frame( data_all %>% dplyr::filter(Destroyed == "Exist") %>% 
                             dplyr::filter(Sowing_1st =="09/2021") %>% dplyr::filter(Sowing_2nd =="no"))

mod1 <- glm(Presence_April_24 ~ Type, data = April_24 ,family = binomial)
summary(mod1)
## 
## Call:
## glm(formula = Presence_April_24 ~ Type, family = binomial, data = April_24)
## 
## Coefficients:
##              Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept)   -1.4586     0.2482  -5.876 4.21e-09 ***
## Typepavement   0.8396     0.3249   2.584  0.00977 ** 
## TypeTree bed   0.8708     0.3257   2.674  0.00750 ** 
## Typewall       1.5012     0.3831   3.918 8.91e-05 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## (Dispersion parameter for binomial family taken to be 1)
## 
##     Null deviance: 442.56  on 350  degrees of freedom
## Residual deviance: 425.04  on 347  degrees of freedom
## AIC: 433.04
## 
## Number of Fisher Scoring iterations: 4
anova(mod1, test="LRT")
## Analysis of Deviance Table
## 
## Model: binomial, link: logit
## 
## Response: Presence_April_24
## 
## Terms added sequentially (first to last)
## 
## 
##      Df Deviance Resid. Df Resid. Dev  Pr(>Chi)    
## NULL                   350     442.56              
## Type  3   17.518       347     425.04 0.0005529 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
qqnorm(resid(mod1))

summary(glht(mod1,linfct = mcp(Type="Tukey")))
## 
##   Simultaneous Tests for General Linear Hypotheses
## 
## Multiple Comparisons of Means: Tukey Contrasts
## 
## 
## Fit: glm(formula = Presence_April_24 ~ Type, family = binomial, data = April_24)
## 
## Linear Hypotheses:
##                          Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## pavement - grass == 0     0.83958    0.32494   2.584   0.0476 *  
## Tree bed - grass == 0     0.87083    0.32569   2.674   0.0368 *  
## wall - grass == 0         1.50117    0.38311   3.918   <0.001 ***
## Tree bed - pavement == 0  0.03125    0.29732   0.105   0.9996    
## wall - pavement == 0      0.66160    0.35931   1.841   0.2521    
## wall - Tree bed == 0      0.63035    0.35999   1.751   0.2952    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## (Adjusted p values reported -- single-step method)

Compare April 2022 2023 2024

# adding to data frame for establishment percentage in one column
tmp <- data.frame("Year" = c("2024","2024","2024","2024"),"Type_Year" = c("grass_24","pavement_24","Tree bed_24","wall_24"), "Percentage_establishment" = establishment$Percentage_April24_S1)
establishment2 <- rbind(tmp, establishment2)


colors <- c("#6ece58", "#6ece58", "#6ece58", "#22a884","#22a884", "#22a884", "#355f8d", "#355f8d",  "#355f8d", "#440154", "#440154", "#440154")
ggplot(establishment2, aes(x = Type_Year ,y=Percentage_establishment, fill = Type_Year)) + geom_bar(aes(alpha = Year), stat = "identity") +
  theme_minimal() +  scale_discrete_manual(aesthetics = "fill", values =colors)+ scale_alpha_discrete(range = c(0.5,1))

Model presence / absence mod with Years in random effect

# preparation of the data set 
tmp1 <- April_24[,c(4,12)]
colnames(tmp1) <- c("Type", "Presence")
tmp1$Census_Year <- paste(tmp1$Type, "_", "2024")
tmp1$Year <- rep("2024")

mod_Presence <- rbind(mod_Presence, tmp1)
mod_Presence$Census_Year <- as.factor(mod_Presence$Census_Year)
  
mod4 <- glmer(Presence ~ Type +(1|Year), data = mod_Presence ,family = binomial)
summary(mod4)
## Generalized linear mixed model fit by maximum likelihood (Laplace
##   Approximation) [glmerMod]
##  Family: binomial  ( logit )
## Formula: Presence ~ Type + (1 | Year)
##    Data: mod_Presence
## 
##       AIC       BIC    logLik -2*log(L)  df.resid 
##    1367.7    1392.7    -678.8    1357.7      1092 
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -1.3094 -0.7685 -0.5197  1.2116  1.9681 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups Name        Variance Std.Dev.
##  Year   (Intercept) 0.003719 0.06099 
## Number of obs: 1097, groups:  Year, 3
## 
## Fixed effects:
##              Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept)   -1.3158     0.1385  -9.499  < 2e-16 ***
## Typepavement   0.9002     0.1760   5.115 3.14e-07 ***
## TypeTree bed   0.7574     0.1795   4.221 2.44e-05 ***
## Typewall       1.8233     0.2196   8.302  < 2e-16 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Correlation of Fixed Effects:
##             (Intr) Typpvm TypTrb
## Typepavemnt -0.734              
## TypeTreebed -0.721  0.566       
## Typewall    -0.590  0.463  0.455
car::Anova(mod4, type=3)
## Analysis of Deviance Table (Type III Wald chisquare tests)
## 
## Response: Presence
##              Chisq Df Pr(>Chisq)    
## (Intercept) 90.236  1  < 2.2e-16 ***
## Type        71.013  3  2.591e-15 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
qqnorm(resid(mod4))

summary(glht(mod4,linfct = mcp(Type="Tukey"))) 
## 
##   Simultaneous Tests for General Linear Hypotheses
## 
## Multiple Comparisons of Means: Tukey Contrasts
## 
## 
## Fit: glmer(formula = Presence ~ Type + (1 | Year), data = mod_Presence, 
##     family = binomial)
## 
## Linear Hypotheses:
##                          Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## pavement - grass == 0      0.9002     0.1760   5.115  < 1e-04 ***
## Tree bed - grass == 0      0.7574     0.1795   4.221 0.000145 ***
## wall - grass == 0          1.8233     0.2196   8.302  < 1e-04 ***
## Tree bed - pavement == 0  -0.1428     0.1656  -0.862 0.822478    
## wall - pavement == 0       0.9231     0.2084   4.430  < 1e-04 ***
## wall - Tree bed == 0       1.0659     0.2112   5.047  < 1e-04 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## (Adjusted p values reported -- single-step method)
#no interaction between type and census year
leastsquare = lsmeans(mod4, pairwise ~ Type,adjust = "tukey")
cld(leastsquare)
##  Type     lsmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL .group
##  grass    -1.316 0.139 Inf    -1.587    -1.044  1    
##  Tree bed -0.558 0.125 Inf    -0.803    -0.314   2   
##  pavement -0.416 0.120 Inf    -0.651    -0.180   2   
##  wall      0.508 0.177 Inf     0.160     0.855    3  
## 
## Results are given on the logit (not the response) scale. 
## Confidence level used: 0.95 
## Results are given on the log odds ratio (not the response) scale. 
## P value adjustment: tukey method for comparing a family of 4 estimates 
## significance level used: alpha = 0.05 
## NOTE: If two or more means share the same grouping symbol,
##       then we cannot show them to be different.
##       But we also did not show them to be the same.

Model presence / absence mod with Years in nested effects

mod5 <- glm(Presence ~ Type*Year, data = mod_Presence ,family = binomial)
summary(mod5)
## 
## Call:
## glm(formula = Presence ~ Type * Year, family = binomial, data = mod_Presence)
## 
## Coefficients:
##                        Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept)           -1.295780   0.221332  -5.854 4.79e-09 ***
## Typepavement           0.833962   0.290561   2.870  0.00410 ** 
## TypeTree bed           0.952836   0.296385   3.215  0.00131 ** 
## Typewall               2.481404   0.409481   6.060 1.36e-09 ***
## Year2023               0.095816   0.317861   0.301  0.76308    
## Year2024              -0.162835   0.332589  -0.490  0.62442    
## Typepavement:Year2023  0.205660   0.420394   0.489  0.62470    
## TypeTree bed:Year2023 -0.523576   0.432522  -1.211  0.22608    
## Typewall:Year2023     -0.893674   0.555039  -1.610  0.10737    
## Typepavement:Year2024  0.005614   0.435901   0.013  0.98973    
## TypeTree bed:Year2024 -0.082007   0.440359  -0.186  0.85227    
## Typewall:Year2024     -0.980229   0.560756  -1.748  0.08046 .  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## (Dispersion parameter for binomial family taken to be 1)
## 
##     Null deviance: 1434.8  on 1096  degrees of freedom
## Residual deviance: 1345.4  on 1085  degrees of freedom
## AIC: 1369.4
## 
## Number of Fisher Scoring iterations: 4
car::Anova(mod5)
## Analysis of Deviance Table (Type II tests)
## 
## Response: Presence
##           LR Chisq Df Pr(>Chisq)    
## Type        77.739  3     <2e-16 ***
## Year         3.888  2     0.1431    
## Type:Year    8.497  6     0.2039    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
qqnorm(resid(mod5))

summary(glht(mod5,linfct = mcp(Type="Tukey"))) 
## 
##   Simultaneous Tests for General Linear Hypotheses
## 
## Multiple Comparisons of Means: Tukey Contrasts
## 
## 
## Fit: glm(formula = Presence ~ Type * Year, family = binomial, data = mod_Presence)
## 
## Linear Hypotheses:
##                          Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)    
## pavement - grass == 0      0.8340     0.2906   2.870  0.02043 *  
## Tree bed - grass == 0      0.9528     0.2964   3.215  0.00701 ** 
## wall - grass == 0          2.4814     0.4095   6.060  < 0.001 ***
## Tree bed - pavement == 0   0.1189     0.2726   0.436  0.97157    
## wall - pavement == 0       1.6474     0.3926   4.196  < 0.001 ***
## wall - Tree bed == 0       1.5286     0.3969   3.851  < 0.001 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## (Adjusted p values reported -- single-step method)
#no interaction between type and census year
leastsquare = lsmeans(mod5, pairwise ~ Type*Year,adjust = "tukey")
cld(leastsquare)
##  Type     Year  lsmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL .group
##  grass    2024 -1.4586 0.248 Inf    -1.945   -0.9721  1    
##  grass    2022 -1.2958 0.221 Inf    -1.730   -0.8620  12   
##  grass    2023 -1.2000 0.228 Inf    -1.647   -0.7528  12   
##  Tree bed 2023 -0.7707 0.217 Inf    -1.196   -0.3450  123  
##  pavement 2024 -0.6190 0.210 Inf    -1.030   -0.2081  123  
##  Tree bed 2024 -0.5878 0.211 Inf    -1.001   -0.1746  123  
##  pavement 2022 -0.4618 0.188 Inf    -0.831   -0.0929  123  
##  Tree bed 2022 -0.3429 0.197 Inf    -0.729    0.0434   23  
##  pavement 2023 -0.1603 0.201 Inf    -0.554    0.2329    3  
##  wall     2024  0.0426 0.292 Inf    -0.529    0.6145    34 
##  wall     2023  0.3878 0.297 Inf    -0.195    0.9703    34 
##  wall     2022  1.1856 0.345 Inf     0.510    1.8608     4 
## 
## Results are given on the logit (not the response) scale. 
## Confidence level used: 0.95 
## Results are given on the log odds ratio (not the response) scale. 
## P value adjustment: tukey method for comparing a family of 12 estimates 
## significance level used: alpha = 0.05 
## NOTE: If two or more means share the same grouping symbol,
##       then we cannot show them to be different.
##       But we also did not show them to be the same.
mod5_emm <- emmeans::ref_grid(mod5)
emm <- emmeans::emmeans(mod5_emm, ~ Year | Type)
pairs(emm )
## Type = grass:
##  contrast            estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Year2022 - Year2023  -0.0958 0.318 Inf  -0.301  0.9511
##  Year2022 - Year2024   0.1628 0.333 Inf   0.490  0.8763
##  Year2023 - Year2024   0.2587 0.337 Inf   0.767  0.7232
## 
## Type = pavement:
##  contrast            estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Year2022 - Year2023  -0.3015 0.275 Inf  -1.096  0.5167
##  Year2022 - Year2024   0.1572 0.282 Inf   0.558  0.8424
##  Year2023 - Year2024   0.4587 0.290 Inf   1.581  0.2540
## 
## Type = Tree bed:
##  contrast            estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Year2022 - Year2023   0.4278 0.293 Inf   1.458  0.3112
##  Year2022 - Year2024   0.2448 0.289 Inf   0.848  0.6729
##  Year2023 - Year2024  -0.1829 0.303 Inf  -0.604  0.8178
## 
## Type = wall:
##  contrast            estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Year2022 - Year2023   0.7979 0.455 Inf   1.754  0.1855
##  Year2022 - Year2024   1.1431 0.451 Inf   2.532  0.0305
##  Year2023 - Year2024   0.3452 0.417 Inf   0.829  0.6851
## 
## Results are given on the log odds ratio (not the response) scale. 
## P value adjustment: tukey method for comparing a family of 3 estimates
emm <- emmeans::emmeans(mod5_emm, ~ Type)
pairs(emm )
##  contrast            estimate    SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  grass - pavement      -0.904 0.177 Inf  -5.106  <.0001
##  grass - Tree bed      -0.751 0.180 Inf  -4.161  0.0002
##  grass - wall          -1.857 0.225 Inf  -8.259  <.0001
##  pavement - Tree bed    0.153 0.167 Inf   0.920  0.7940
##  pavement - wall       -0.952 0.214 Inf  -4.452  0.0001
##  Tree bed - wall       -1.106 0.217 Inf  -5.103  <.0001
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: Year 
## Results are given on the log odds ratio (not the response) scale. 
## P value adjustment: tukey method for comparing a family of 4 estimates

July 2022 sowing only

No environmental effects

# Number of site after removing the destroyed site before 05/2023
tmp <-as.data.frame( data_all %>% dplyr::filter(Destroyed == "Exist") %>% 
                 dplyr::filter(Sowing_1st =="07/2022") %>% count(Type))
establishment$Site_April24_S2 <- tmp[,2]

# Established sites
tmp <- as.data.frame(data_all %>% dplyr::filter(Destroyed == "Exist") %>% 
                       dplyr::filter(Sowing_1st =="07/2022") %>% dplyr::filter(Presence_April_24 == "Yes") %>% count(Type))

tmp <- rbind(tmp[1:2,],c("Tree bed", 0),tmp[-(1:2),])
establishment$Established_April24_S2 <- tmp[,2]  
establishment$Established_April24_S2 <- as.numeric(establishment$Established_April24_S2)

establishment$Percentage_April24_S2 <- round(establishment$Established_April24_S2 / establishment$Site_April24_S2 * 100, digit = 2)

establishment %>% filter(Type != "Tree bed") %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = Type, y=Percentage_April24_S2, fill = Type)) + geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  theme_minimal() + scale_fill_viridis(discrete = TRUE, begin = 0.3, end = 0.9, option = "B" )  

April_24_S2 <- as.data.frame( data_all %>% dplyr::filter(Destroyed == "Exist") %>% 
                             dplyr::filter(Sowing_1st =="07/2022") %>% dplyr::filter(Sowing_2nd =="no"))

mod1 <- glm(Presence_April_24 ~ Type, data = April_24_S2 ,family = binomial)
summary(mod1)
## 
## Call:
## glm(formula = Presence_April_24 ~ Type, family = binomial, data = April_24_S2)
## 
## Coefficients:
##               Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)
## (Intercept)     0.8473     0.6901   1.228    0.220
## Typepavement    0.2513     0.8619   0.292    0.771
## TypeTree bed  -16.4134  1455.3977  -0.011    0.991
## Typewall       -0.5729     0.7542  -0.760    0.448
## 
## (Dispersion parameter for binomial family taken to be 1)
## 
##     Null deviance: 99.106  on 74  degrees of freedom
## Residual deviance: 94.887  on 71  degrees of freedom
## AIC: 102.89
## 
## Number of Fisher Scoring iterations: 14
anova(mod1, test="LRT")
## Analysis of Deviance Table
## 
## Model: binomial, link: logit
## 
## Response: Presence_April_24
## 
## Terms added sequentially (first to last)
## 
## 
##      Df Deviance Resid. Df Resid. Dev Pr(>Chi)
## NULL                    74     99.106         
## Type  3    4.219        71     94.887   0.2388
qqnorm(resid(mod1))

Comparing April 2023 and April 2024

Year effect significant, but not the environment

# adding to data frame for establishment percentage in one column
establishment2  <- data.frame("Type" = c("grass","pavement","Tree bed","wall","grass","pavement","Tree bed","wall"),
                  "Year" = c("2023","2023","2023","2023","2024","2024","2024","2024"),
                  "Type_Year" = c("grass_23","pavement_23","Tree bed_23","wall_23","grass_24","pavement_24","Tree bed_24","wall_24"), 
                  "Percentage_establishment" = c(establishment$Percentage_April23_S2,establishment$Percentage_April24_S2))


colors <- c("#6ece58", "#6ece58","#22a884", "#22a884", "#440154", "#440154")
establishment2 %>% filter(Type != "Tree bed") %>%
  ggplot( aes(x = Type_Year ,y=Percentage_establishment, fill = Type_Year)) + geom_bar(aes(alpha = Year), stat = "identity") +
  theme_minimal() +  scale_discrete_manual(aesthetics = "fill", values =colors)+ scale_alpha_discrete(range = c(0.5,1))

# preparation of the data set 
tmp1 <- April_23_S2[,c(4,11)]
colnames(tmp1) <- c("Type", "Presence")
tmp1$Census_Year <- paste(tmp1$Type, "_", "2023")
tmp1$Year <- rep("2023")

tmp2 <- April_24[,c(4,12)]
colnames(tmp2) <- c("Type", "Presence")
tmp2$Census_Year <- paste(tmp2$Type, "_", "2024")
tmp2$Year <- rep("2024")

mod_Presence <- rbind(tmp1, tmp2)

mod_Presence <- mod_Presence %>% filter(Type != "Tree bed")

mod3 <- glm(Presence ~ Type*Year, data = mod_Presence ,family = binomial)
summary(mod3)
## 
## Call:
## glm(formula = Presence ~ Type * Year, family = binomial, data = mod_Presence)
## 
## Coefficients:
##                       Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)
## (Intercept)              16.57     758.80   0.022    0.983
## Typepavement            -13.62     758.80  -0.018    0.986
## Typewall                -14.51     758.80  -0.019    0.985
## Year2024                -18.02     758.80  -0.024    0.981
## Typepavement:Year2024    14.46     758.80   0.019    0.985
## Typewall:Year2024        16.01     758.80   0.021    0.983
## 
## (Dispersion parameter for binomial family taken to be 1)
## 
##     Null deviance: 449.98  on 326  degrees of freedom
## Residual deviance: 336.39  on 321  degrees of freedom
## AIC: 348.39
## 
## Number of Fisher Scoring iterations: 15
anova(mod3,test="LRT")
## Analysis of Deviance Table
## 
## Model: binomial, link: logit
## 
## Response: Presence
## 
## Terms added sequentially (first to last)
## 
## 
##           Df Deviance Resid. Df Resid. Dev  Pr(>Chi)    
## NULL                        326     449.98              
## Type       2   39.878       324     410.10 2.191e-09 ***
## Year       1   66.961       323     343.14 2.769e-16 ***
## Type:Year  2    6.750       321     336.39   0.03421 *  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
qqnorm(resid(mod3))

mod3_emm <- emmeans::ref_grid(mod3)
emm <- emmeans::emmeans(mod3_emm, ~ Year | Type)
pairs(emm )
## Type = grass:
##  contrast            estimate      SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Year2023 - Year2024    18.02 759.000 Inf   0.024  0.9810
## 
## Type = pavement:
##  contrast            estimate      SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Year2023 - Year2024     3.56   1.050 Inf   3.403  0.0007
## 
## Type = wall:
##  contrast            estimate      SE  df z.ratio p.value
##  Year2023 - Year2024     2.01   0.558 Inf   3.608  0.0003
## 
## Results are given on the log odds ratio (not the response) scale.

Comparing establishment between 2021 sowing and 2022 sowing

April 2024 only

To compare both sowing we are going to compare the number of established individual over the total number of seed sown (2021 : 1 000 seeds, 2022 : 10 000 seeds)

tmp  <- as.data.frame(data_all %>% dplyr::filter(Destroyed == "Exist") %>% 
                 dplyr::filter(Sowing_2nd =="no") %>% select(Site_ID, Type, Sowing_1st, EndMarch_24))

tmp1<- tmp %>% dplyr::filter(Sowing_1st =="09/2021") %>% mutate(EndMarch_24 / 1000 *100)
colnames(tmp1) <- c("Site_ID", "Type", "Sowing_1st", "April_24", "Idv_establised_24")

tmp2 <- tmp %>% dplyr::filter(Sowing_1st =="07/2022") %>% mutate(EndMarch_24 / 10000 *100)
colnames(tmp2) <- c("Site_ID", "Type", "Sowing_1st", "April_24", "Idv_establised_24")

tmp  <- rbind(tmp1, tmp2)
tmp  <- rbind(tmp, c("364", "grass", "09/2021", NA, NA), c(c("365", "grass", "09/2021", NA, NA)))
establishment_S1_S2 <- merge(establishment_S1_S2, tmp[,c(1,4,5)], by = "Site_ID")
establishment_S1_S2$Idv_establised_24 <- as.numeric(establishment_S1_S2$Idv_establised_24 )

For the graphic I removed the site with no established populations to be more easy to read.

colors <- c("gold1", "darkgoldenrod4")
establishment_S1_S2 %>% filter(Idv_establised_24 >0) %>% filter(Type == "pavement" | Type =="grass" | Type =="wall") %>%
  ggplot( aes(x = Type_Year ,y=Idv_establised_24, fill = Sowing_1st)) + geom_boxplot() +  theme_minimal() +  scale_discrete_manual(aesthetics = "fill", values =colors)

For the model I kept the site with no population established

establishment_S1_S2_mod <- establishment_S1_S2 %>% filter(Type != "Tree bed") 

mod2 <- glm.nb(Idv_establised_24 ~  Type*Sowing_1st, data = establishment_S1_S2_mod)

mod3 <- glm(Idv_establised_24 ~ Type*Sowing_1st, data = establishment_S1_S2_mod, family=negative.binomial(theta=mod2[["theta"]]))
summary(mod3)
## 
## Call:
## glm(formula = Idv_establised_24 ~ Type * Sowing_1st, family = negative.binomial(theta = mod2[["theta"]]), 
##     data = establishment_S1_S2_mod)
## 
## Coefficients:
##                                Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)
## (Intercept)                    -1.13010    1.07601  -1.050    0.294
## Typepavement                   -0.85403    1.44047  -0.593    0.554
## Typewall                        0.17441    1.18435   0.147    0.883
## Sowing_1st09/2021              -0.07073    1.12716  -0.063    0.950
## Typepavement:Sowing_1st09/2021  2.19810    1.50576   1.460    0.145
## Typewall:Sowing_1st09/2021      0.42665    1.31065   0.326    0.745
## 
## (Dispersion parameter for Negative Binomial(0.2468) family taken to be 1.61971)
## 
##     Null deviance: 258.84  on 326  degrees of freedom
## Residual deviance: 236.45  on 321  degrees of freedom
##   (2 observations deleted due to missingness)
## AIC: 585.86
## 
## Number of Fisher Scoring iterations: 8
anova(mod3, test="LRT")
## Analysis of Deviance Table
## 
## Model: Negative Binomial(0.2468), link: log
## 
## Response: Idv_establised_24
## 
## Terms added sequentially (first to last)
## 
## 
##                 Df Deviance Resid. Df Resid. Dev Pr(>Chi)  
## NULL                              326     258.84           
## Type             2  14.3171       324     244.52  0.01204 *
## Sowing_1st       1   3.3911       323     241.13  0.14791  
## Type:Sowing_1st  2   4.6766       321     236.45  0.23606  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
qqnorm(resid(mod3))

summary(glht(mod3,linfct = mcp(Type="Tukey"))) 
## 
##   Simultaneous Tests for General Linear Hypotheses
## 
## Multiple Comparisons of Means: Tukey Contrasts
## 
## 
## Fit: glm(formula = Idv_establised_24 ~ Type * Sowing_1st, family = negative.binomial(theta = mod2[["theta"]]), 
##     data = establishment_S1_S2_mod)
## 
## Linear Hypotheses:
##                       Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)
## pavement - grass == 0  -0.8540     1.4405  -0.593    0.821
## wall - grass == 0       0.1744     1.1844   0.147    0.988
## wall - pavement == 0    1.0284     1.0780   0.954    0.600
## (Adjusted p values reported -- single-step method)
#no interaction between type and census year
leastsquare = lsmeans(mod3, pairwise ~ Type*Sowing_1st,adjust = "tukey")
cld(leastsquare)
##  Type     Sowing_1st lsmean    SE  df asymp.LCL asymp.UCL .group
##  pavement 07/2022    -1.984 0.958 Inf     -3.86   -0.1071  12   
##  grass    09/2021    -1.201 0.336 Inf     -1.86   -0.5429  1    
##  grass    07/2022    -1.130 1.080 Inf     -3.24    0.9788  12   
##  wall     07/2022    -0.956 0.495 Inf     -1.93    0.0142  12   
##  wall     09/2021    -0.600 0.450 Inf     -1.48    0.2820  12   
##  pavement 09/2021     0.143 0.282 Inf     -0.41    0.6964   2   
## 
## Results are given on the log (not the response) scale. 
## Confidence level used: 0.95 
## P value adjustment: tukey method for comparing a family of 6 estimates 
## significance level used: alpha = 0.05 
## NOTE: If two or more means share the same grouping symbol,
##       then we cannot show them to be different.
##       But we also did not show them to be the same.
